game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Guide 'Skul' on his quest to single-handedly take on the Imperial Army and rescue his King from captivity, in an action-packed rogue-lite 2D platformer for the ages.

The Demon King's Castle in Ruins

The human race attacking the Demon King's castle is nothing new and has happened countless times before. What makes this time different though, is that the Adventurers decided to join forces with the Imperial Army and the 'Hero of Caerleon' to lead a full onslaught in hopes of wiping out the Demons once and for all. They attacked the Demon stronghold with overwhelming numbers and succeeded in its total destruction. All of the demons in the castle were taken prisoner except for one lone skeleton named 'Skul'.


Side-Scrolling Platformer Action

'Skul: The Hero Slayer' is an action-platformer that boasts rogue-like features such as everchanging and challenging maps. It will keep you on your toes, as you will never know what to expect.



Tons of skulls, tons of playable characters

Skul is no ordinary skeleton. In addition to his formidable fighting skills, he can gain new and exciting abilities depending on which skull he's wearing. Use up to 2 skulls at a time, each of which has its own unique attack range, speed and power. Choose combos that match your playing style and switch them in the heat of battle to bring your enemies to their knees. The power is in your hands!



The Adventurers

Skul has crossed paths with a party of Adventurers! They are powerful foes that hunt Demons for sport. While Skul may be small, he still packs quite a punch. So just wait and see who really is the hunter and who is the hunted....
 

Bosses Corrupted by Dark Quartz

At the end of every chapter, go head-to-head with massive bosses corrupted with Dark Quartz and powerful beyond belief. Derived from the pain and hate of life itself, Dark Quartz taints and takes control of everything it touches.
game_info.description: Guide Skul, the lone skeleton survivor, through a perilous platforming adventure to rescue the captured Demon King. Battle through waves of Imperial soldiers, collect powerful skull transformations, and defeat the corrupted boss at the end. Master the art of skull-swapping to adapt your combat style and overcome increasingly difficult challenges in this action-packed rogue-lite platformer.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, jump (up arrow)
Z: Attack with current skull
Space: Switch between equipped skulls
Shift: Special ability (dash/power attack depending on skull)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and combat mechanics. Verify that Skul can move, jump, attack enemies, and survive basic encounters without dying.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right through the level, jump over obstacles, attack nearby enemies with Z key. Maintain safe distance from enemies while attacking. Collect any skull pickups encountered.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates through initial sections, defeats several enemies, and demonstrates responsive controls. Test is successful if player survives for at least 30 seconds and defeats at least 3 enemies.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates through initial sections, defeats several enemies, and demonstrates responsive controls. Test is successful if player survives for at least 30 seconds and defeats at least 3 enemies.

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning strategy - complete the level and defeat the boss. This validates the full game loop from start to victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Progress through the level systematically, defeat all enemies, collect skull power-ups for enhanced abilities. Use skull switching to optimize combat. Reach and defeat the boss using attack patterns and dodging mechanics.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches the boss encounter, deals damage effectively using available skills, defeats the boss, and triggers GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when gameState.gamePhase === "GAME_OVER_WIN".

TEST_3.test_description: Test skull switching mechanics and power-up collection. Verify that collecting skulls adds them to inventory and switching works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Actively seek out skull pickups, collect them, and switch between equipped skulls using Space key. Test different skull abilities in combat scenarios.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully collects skulls, inventory updates correctly, skull switching is responsive, and different skull abilities execute properly. Test succeeds if at least 2 different skulls are collected and used.
